title: Overflowing Bars - Unique Dark
description: A resource pack that changes the style of the "Overflowing Bars" mod by Fuzs to match the "Unique Dark" resource pack by AmongstReality.
body:
A resource pack that changes the style of the "Overflowing Bars" mod by Fuzs to match the "Unique Dark" resource pack by AmongstReality.

God I love Unique Dark...
